---
title: "CDADE Architecture Notes"
author: "CDADE Team"
date: "2026-07-05"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Architecture

## System overview

This document will describe the L1/L2/L3 architecture and the evaluation loop.

## Component checklist

- Detector pool
- Reconciliation layer
- Dynamic selection layer
- Evaluation and ablation outputs

## Inputs

- Statistical summary: results/stats/summary.csv
- Ablation summary: results/ablation/summary.csv
